---
title: "singleFromAny()"
description: "Keyed singleflight over {@link NodeInput}. Concurrent calls with the same key share one Promise; once that input resolves/rejects, the in-flight entry is cleared and a later call re-runs the factory. Host-boundary helper only; it does not create graph topology."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Keyed singleflight over {@link NodeInput}. Concurrent calls with the same key share one Promise;
once that input resolves/rejects, the in-flight entry is cleared and a later call re-runs the
factory. Host-boundary helper only; it does not create graph topology.

## Import

```ts
import { singleFromAny } from "@graphrefly/ts/sources/browser";
```

## Signature

```ts
function singleFromAny(
	factory: (key: K) => NodeInput<T>,
	opts: SingleFromAnyOptions<K> = {},
): (key: K) => Promise<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `factory` | `(key: K) => NodeInput<T>` | Missing @param factory JSDoc. |
| `opts` | `SingleFromAnyOptions<K>` | Missing @param opts JSDoc. |

## Returns

`(key: K) => Promise<T>`
